page_metadata.biotools__summary: SENIES is a deep learning based two-layer predictor for enhancing the identification of enhancers and their strength by utilizing DNA shape information beyond two common sequence-derived features, namely kmer and one-hot.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SENIES is a deep learning based two-layer predictor for enhancing the identification of enhancers and their strength by utilizing DNA shape information beyond two common sequence-derived features, namely kmer and one-hot.
